name: Curried Salmon with Poppadoms
recipeIngredient: 213 g Canned Alaska salmon (pink or red)
2 tsp Medium hot curry paste (or more, if desired)
1 Red apple, core removed and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned salmon and flake the fish. Set aside.
2. Mix together the mayonnaise, yogurt, lime juice, curry paste, dill cucumber, avocado, and apple in a bowl. Season lightly and stir in the salmon flakes.
3. Heat the vegetable oil in a frying pan. Fry each poppadom gently until they are crisp and the edges have curled up. Avoid cooking too rapidly to prevent uneven curling.
4. Spoon equal amounts of the salmon curry mixture onto each poppadom.
5. Serve on individual plates, garnished with a little salad and lime slices.
Serves 6. Approx. 240 kcals per serving
